initiative_name: 3.3 Commitments in the application of the social pillar for updating and implementing the NDC
parent_statement: Contribution in Just Transition and Sustainable Development N°1-2-3 (SP1-2-3).
coverage_assessment: The sub-actions collectively address the parent goal of embedding the Section 3.2 social pillar into NDC update/elaboration/implementation by (i) requiring application of the criteria, (ii) adding an MRV mechanism to track application, and (iii) developing a Just Transition strategy tied to energy-matrix decarbonization and participation. A key gap is the absence of explicit quantitative indicators defining what successful “application” looks like, which limits trackability of outcomes beyond completion of the strategy and existence of a mechanism.
coherence_assessment: The sub-actions are complementary and logically sequenced: apply criteria (SP1), measure/verify application (SP2), and develop a Just Transition strategy with participation safeguards (SP3). There is no obvious redundancy or contradiction, but the cluster would be stronger if SP2 specified what is measured and when reporting occurs.

strong_signals: MRV mechanism specified, explicit deadline (by 2021) to develop Just Transition Strategy, clear linkage to NDC processes and energy-matrix decarbonization
